notable_phrases: we estimate these constraints had around a $6 billion revenue dollar impact
we believe that by the time we finish the quarter that the constraints will be larger than the 6 billion
summary: Apple reported strong revenue growth of 29% despite $6 billion in supply chain constraints, with management expressing confidence in demand but cautioning that supply headwinds will worsen in the December quarter.
change_flags: Forward guidance sentiment decreased by 17.00; Analyst pushback level increased by 10.00
change_summary: vs 2021 Q3: Forward guidance sentiment decreased by 17.00; Analyst pushback level increased by 10.00.
